rationale: Section 11.50 governs inter-appraiser sharing of homestead exemption recipient names. Changing the dollar amount of the exemption under §11.13(b) has no bearing on this information-sharing procedure.
quote: The chief appraiser of an appraisal district may request that the chief appraiser of another appraisal district provide to the requesting chief appraiser a list of the names of all individuals who currently receive an exemption for a residence homestead
_note: No conflict; §11.50 is procedural and amount-agnostic.
